scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:global" "npm run dev:local" "npm run dev:desktop" --names "global,local,desktop" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,magenta"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:global" "npm run dev:local" "npm run dev:desktop" "npm run dev:admin" --names "global,local,client,admin" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,magenta,yellow"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../global-backend && npm install && cd ../desktop && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
